CommunityApplications.Profile:
**PosterPilot** — a self-hosted poster and artwork manager for **Plex**, **Jellyfin** and **Emby**.
Browse one media server, resolve titles to TMDB, and find covers across multiple providers — **MediUX**, **Fanart.tv**, **TMDB** and **ThePosterDB**. Apply artwork directly to your media server and/or export **Kometa/PMM**-compatible YAML so your existing Kometa run picks it up.
Multi-language UI (English, Spanish, Chinese, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese). Configure credentials via Docker variables or the in-app Settings page (including Plex login). Point the `/kometa` volume at your existing Kometa config directory to have exported YAML land where Kometa reads it.
For support, post in the Unraid support thread; for bug reports, open a GitHub issue: https://forums.unraid.net/topic/199615-support-posterpilot-posterartwork-manager-for-plexjellyfinemby/ https://github.com/diegopeixoto/posterpilot/issues
